steps.title: Factor the target expression
steps.content: The target expression is $16+8x$. Factor out $8$: $$16+8x=8(2+x).$$

steps.title: Use the given value directly
steps.content: The problem gives $2+x=60$, so substitute that value into the factored expression: $$16+8x=8(2+x)=8(60)=480.$$ The answer is 480.

steps.title: Why this is faster
steps.content: You could solve $x=58$ first, but it is unnecessary because the expression already contains the group $2+x$ after factoring.
